reviews.review_msg: He is a great Prof. Very passionate about his work and he always available to help. Looking forward to take more classes with him.
Lectures are confusing and sometimes all over the place. He seems like a nice guy but doesn't really excel in teaching clearly. Marking is tough. There's a lot of material so study hard.
Very nice guy, but quite confusing at times. Classes aren't very structured, but you can tell he's a smart guy and he loves what he talks about. Likes to laugh at his own jokes.
